prompt: Determine whether the work meets the applicable code, spec, drawing, or manufacturer requirement.
scenario: In a T2 work setting, the evaluated element is X-101 Lockout/Tagout within 2.12 Safety & Rigging. The relevant subcategory is 2.10.4 Quality Inspection. The observed field condition is: energy source missed (stored hydraulic/gravity/capacitor). The work is being assessed at the rough-complete lifecycle state with source anchors OSHA 1910.147.
title: T2 X-101 Code/spec compliance
